description: DSI Ltd. is a software development company specializing in e-commerce solutions and business management systems, focusing on delivering custom web applications for diverse business needs.
• Development and maintenance of multiple e-commerce platforms (Kozelat.com/Outletpc.bg) with automated product imports
• Creation and support of MiAudit, a comprehensive auditing system for UK cleaning companies
• Server administration and deployment management across multiple hosting environments
• Implementation of agile methodologies with emphasis on pair programming and continuous delivery
• Server management: Unix shell, cron jobs
• E-Commerce Development – Building and customizing online stores with automated product synchronization
• Back-office Systems – Creating audit and management platforms for service-based businesses
• DevOps & Infrastructure – Managing deployments and maintaining cloud-based hosting environments
• Agile Practices – Implementing Kanban workflows with pair programming for enhanced code quality
• System Integration – Developing automated data import solutions for multiple supplier systems
